name: Gold Baron
description: Passive: Gain +1 gold at the start of each tavern phase.

name: War Chanter
description: Active (2 gold): Give a random friendly unit +1/+1. Once each tavern phase.

name: Recruiter Queen
description: Active (2 gold): Add a random unit to your bench. Once each tavern phase.

name: Iron Guardian
description: Active (1 gold): Give a random friendly unit +2 max HP. Once each tavern phase.
